sentences.sentence: When students graduate and first enter the workforce, the most common choice is to find an entry-level position.
sentences.translation: 当学生毕业并首次进入职场时，最常见的选择是寻找一份入门级职位。

structure.text: When students graduate and first enter the workforce
is to find an entry-level position

difficult_points: When 从句交代进入职场的时间背景。
不定式短语 to find an entry-level position 作表语，说明 choice 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: This can be a job such as an unpaid internship, an assistant, a secretary, or a junior partner position.
sentences.translation: 这可以是一份工作，例如无薪实习、助理、秘书或初级合伙人职位。

structure.text: a job such as an unpaid internship, an assistant, a secretary, or a junior partner position

difficult_points: such as 后列举四种入门职位，This 指代前一句的 entry-level position。
can be a job 表示“可能是一份工作”，后面的名词短语作补语。

sentences.sentence: Traditionally, we start with simpler jobs and work our way up.
sentences.translation: 传统上，我们从较简单的工作做起，一步步向上发展。

structure.text: start with simpler jobs and work our way up

difficult_points: start out 与 work our way up 构成“从基层逐步晋升”的习惯表达。
Traditionally 是句首副词，说明这是传统做法。

sentences.sentence: Young professionals start out with a plan to become senior partners, associates, or even managers of a workplace.
sentences.translation: 年轻职场人士一开始就计划成为高级合伙人、同事，甚至工作场所的经理。

structure.text: with a plan to become senior partners, associates, or even managers of a workplace

difficult_points: with a plan to... 表示带着成为更高职位的计划。
to become 后并列三个职位，甚至经理用 even 加强语气。

sentences.sentence: However, these promotions can be few and far between, leaving many young professionals unfamiliar with management experience.
sentences.translation: 然而，这类晋升机会可能十分少见，许多年轻职场人士因此缺乏管理经验。

structure.text: can be few and far between
leaving many young professionals unfamiliar with management experience

difficult_points: few and far between 表示晋升机会非常少。
leaving 分词短语表示晋升稀少带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: An important step is understanding the role and responsibilities of a person in a managing position.
sentences.translation: 理解管理职位人员的角色和职责，是一个重要步骤。

structure.text: understanding the role and responsibilities of a person in a managing position

difficult_points: understanding 动名词短语作主语。
of a person in a managing position 修饰 role and responsibilities。

sentences.sentence: Managers are organisational members who are responsible for the work performance of other organisational members.
sentences.translation: 经理是负责其他组织成员工作表现的组织成员。

structure.text: who are responsible for the work performance of other organisational members

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 organisational members。
be responsible for 表示“负责”，work performance 是其宾语。

sentences.sentence: Managers have formal authority to use organisational resources and to make decisions.
sentences.translation: 经理拥有使用组织资源和作出决策的正式权力。

structure.text: to use organisational resources and to make decisions

difficult_points: to use 和 to make 两个不定式并列，说明 authority 的范围。
have formal authority to 是“有正式权力做某事”的搭配。

sentences.sentence: Managers at different levels of the organisation engage in different amounts of time on the four managerial functions of planning, organising, leading, and controlling.
sentences.translation: 组织不同层级的经理会在计划、组织、领导和控制这四项管理职能上投入不同的时间。

structure.text: Managers at different levels of the organisation
in different amounts of time on the four managerial functions of planning, organising, leading, and controlling

difficult_points: engage in 表示“投入于”，后面列出四项管理职能。
planning、organising、leading、controlling 是四个并列动名词。

sentences.sentence: However, as many professionals already know, managing styles can be very different depending on where you work.
sentences.translation: 然而，正如许多专业人士已经知道的那样，管理风格会因工作地点不同而大相径庭。
difficult_points: depending on where you work 表示管理风格取决于工作地点。
where 引导介词 depending on 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: Some managing styles are strictly hierarchical.
sentences.translation: 有些管理风格严格遵循层级制度。
difficult_points: strictly 修饰 hierarchical，强调层级管理的严格程度。
are 后接形容词作表语。

sentences.sentence: Other managing styles can be more casual and relaxed, where the manager may act more like a team member rather than a strict boss.
sentences.translation: 另一些管理风格则更加随和放松，经理可能更像团队成员，而不是严厉的老板。

structure.text: can be more casual and relaxed
where the manager may act more like a team member rather than a strict boss

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句修饰前面的 managing styles。
rather than 表示经理更像团队成员而不是老板。

sentences.sentence: Many researchers have created a more scientific approach in studying these different approaches to managing.
sentences.translation: 许多研究人员在研究这些不同的管理方式时，建立了更科学的方法。

structure.text: in studying these different approaches to managing

difficult_points: in studying 是介词 in 后的动名词结构。
approach 与 approaches to managing 分别表示方法及其研究对象。

sentences.sentence: In the 1960s, researcher Henry Mintzberg created a seminal organisational model using three categories.
sentences.translation: 20世纪60年代，研究人员亨利·明茨伯格运用三个类别创建了一个具有开创性的组织模型。

structure.text: a seminal organisational model using three categories

difficult_points: using three categories 是现在分词短语，说明模型建立所用方式。
created a seminal organisational model 是主干。

sentences.sentence: These categories represent three major functional approaches, which are designated as interpersonal, informational and decisional.
sentences.translation: 这些类别代表三种主要的职能方法，分别被称为人际关系型、信息型和决策型。

structure.text: which are designated as interpersonal, informational and decisional

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 approaches。
designated as 后列出三种角色类别。

sentences.sentence: Introduced Category 1: INTERPERSONAL ROLES.
sentences.translation: 介绍类别1：人际关系角色。
difficult_points: 这是一个标题性片段，不含完整主谓结构。
Category 1 后的冒号引出角色类别名称。

sentences.sentence: Interpersonal roles require managers to direct and supervise employees and the organisation.
sentences.translation: 人际关系角色要求经理指导并监督员工和组织。

structure.text: to direct and supervise employees and the organisation

difficult_points: require + 宾语 + to do 构成要求某人做某事。
direct and supervise 两个动词并列。

sentences.sentence: The figurehead is typically a top of middle manager.
sentences.translation: 名义首脑通常是高层或中层经理。
difficult_points: figurehead 指名义上的领导角色。
a top of middle manager 是系动词后的身份补语，原文 top 疑为 top-level。

sentences.sentence: This manager may communicate future organisational goals or ethical guidelines to employees at company meetings.
sentences.translation: 这位经理可能在公司会议上向员工传达未来的组织目标或道德准则。

structure.text: future organisational goals or ethical guidelines

difficult_points: may 表示经理可能进行的沟通行为。
to employees 指明沟通对象，at company meetings 说明场合。

sentences.sentence: They also attend ribbon-cutting ceremonies, host receptions, presentations and other activities associated with the figurehead role.
sentences.translation: 他们还会参加剪彩仪式、主持招待会和演讲，以及其他与名义首脑角色相关的活动。

structure.text: also attend ribbon-cutting ceremonies, host receptions, presentations and other activities

difficult_points: attend、host 等动作并列，省略重复主语。
associated with... 是过去分词短语修饰 activities。

sentences.sentence: A leader acts as an example for other employees to follow, gives commands and directions to subordinates, makes decisions, and mobilises employee support.
sentences.translation: 领导者为其他员工树立榜样，向下属发出命令和指示，作出决策，并调动员工的支持。

structure.text: gives commands and directions to subordinates, makes decisions, and mobilises employee support

difficult_points: for other employees to follow 是不定式短语，说明榜样供谁效仿。
gives、makes、mobilises 与 acts 并列描述领导职责。

sentences.sentence: They are also responsible for the selection and training of employees.
sentences.translation: 他们还负责员工的选拔和培训。

structure.text: for the selection and training of employees

difficult_points: be responsible for 后接 selection 和 training 两个并列名词。
They 承接上文的 leader，指代领导者。

sentences.sentence: Managers must be leaders at all levels of the organisation; often lower-level managers look to top management for this leadership example.
sentences.translation: 经理在组织的各个层级都必须发挥领导作用；下层经理常常把高层管理者视为领导榜样。

structure.text: at all levels of the organisation
often lower-level managers look to top management for this leadership example

difficult_points: 分号连接两个独立分句，后半句补充领导示例。
look to... for... 表示“把……视为……”。

sentences.sentence: In the role of liaison, a manager must coordinate the work of others in different work units, establish alliances between others, and work to share resources.
sentences.translation: 作为联络人，经理必须协调不同工作单位中他人的工作，在他人之间建立联盟，并努力共享资源。

structure.text: must coordinate the work of others in different work units, establish alliances between others, and work to share resources

difficult_points: In the role of liaison 是介词短语，说明经理所处角色。
coordinate、establish、work 三个动词并列。

sentences.sentence: This role is particularly critical for middle managers, who must often compete with other managers for important resources, yet must maintain successful working relationships with them for long time periods.
sentences.translation: 这一角色对中层经理尤其重要；他们常常必须与其他经理竞争重要资源，却又必须长期与这些经理保持良好的工作关系。

structure.text: who must often compete with other managers for important resources, yet must maintain successful working relationships with them for long time periods

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 middle managers。
yet 表示让步转折，compete 与 maintain 两个动作并列。

sentences.sentence: Introduced Category 2: INFORMATIONAL ROLES.
sentences.translation: 介绍类别2：信息型角色。
difficult_points: 这是类别标题片段，不是完整句。
冒号后的 DECISIONAL ROLES 是类别名称。

sentences.sentence: Informational roles are those in which managers obtain and transmit information.
sentences.translation: 信息型角色是经理获取并传递信息时所承担的角色。

structure.text: in which managers obtain and transmit information

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句修饰 those。
obtain and transmit 是并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: These roles have changed dramatically as technology has improved.
sentences.translation: 随着技术进步，这些角色发生了巨大变化。
difficult_points: as technology has improved 引导原因或时间背景从句。
现在完成时 has improved 表示技术进步已发生。

sentences.sentence: The monitor evaluates the performance of others and takes corrective action to improve
sentences.translation: 监控者评估他人的表现，并采取纠正措施来改善

structure.text: evaluates the performance of others and takes corrective action

difficult_points: takes corrective action 与 evaluates 并列。
to improve 表示采取行动的目的，句子在 improve 处被段落截断。

sentences.sentence: that performance.
sentences.translation: 这种表现。
difficult_points: that performance 承接上一段的 improve，that 指前文提到的表现。
这是一个名词短语片段，不能独立构成完整句。

sentences.sentence: Monitors also watch for changes in the environment and within the company that may affect individual and organisational performance.
sentences.translation: 监控者还会留意环境和公司内部的变化，这些变化可能影响个人和组织的表现。

structure.text: also watch for changes in the environment and within the company
that may affect individual and organisational performance

difficult_points: that may affect... 是定语从句，修饰 changes。
watch for 表示留意，within the company 与 in the environment 并列。

sentences.sentence: Monitoring occurs at all levels of management.
sentences.translation: 监控工作发生在管理的各个层级。
difficult_points: Monitoring 动名词作主语。
at all levels of management 表示发生范围。

sentences.sentence: The role of disseminator requires that managers inform employees of changes that affect them and the organisation.
sentences.translation: 传播者这一角色要求经理把影响员工及组织的变化告知员工。

structure.text: that managers inform employees of changes that affect them and the organisation

difficult_points: requires that... 是要求型宾语从句。
that affect them and the organisation 修饰 changes。

sentences.sentence: They also communicate the company's vision and purpose.
sentences.translation: 他们还会传达公司的愿景和宗旨。
difficult_points: They 指代 monitors 或 managers。
vision and purpose 是 communicate 的并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: Introduced Category 3: DECISIONAL ROLES.
sentences.translation: 介绍类别3：决策型角色。
difficult_points: 这是类别标题片段。
DECISIONAL ROLES 指决策型角色。

sentences.sentence: Decisional roles require managers to plan strategy and utilise resources.
sentences.translation: 决策型角色要求经理规划战略并利用资源。

structure.text: to plan strategy and utilise resources

difficult_points: require + 宾语 + to do 表示要求经理规划和利用资源。
plan strategy 与 utilise resources 并列。

sentences.sentence: There are four specific roles that are decisional.
sentences.translation: 决策型角色具体包括四种职责。

structure.text: four specific roles that are decisional

difficult_points: There are 是存在句型，真正主语是 four specific roles。
that are decisional 修饰 roles。

sentences.sentence: The entrepreneur role requires the manager to assign resources to develop innovative goods and services, or to expand a business.
sentences.translation: 企业家角色要求经理分配资源来开发创新的商品和服务，或扩大业务。

structure.text: to assign resources to develop innovative goods and services, or to expand a business

difficult_points: require + the manager + to assign 是使役式要求结构。
to develop 与 to expand 是 assign resources 的目的不定式并列。

sentences.sentence: The disturbance handler corrects unanticipated problems facing the organisation from the internal or external environment.
sentences.translation: 问题处理者会纠正组织面对的来自内部或外部环境的意外问题。

structure.text: unanticipated problems facing the organisation from the internal or external environment

difficult_points: facing the organisation 是现在分词短语修饰 problems。
from the internal or external environment 说明问题来源。

sentences.sentence: The third decisional role, that of resource allocator, involves determining which work units will get which resources.
sentences.translation: 第三种决策角色，即资源分配者，涉及确定哪些工作单位将获得哪些资源。

structure.text: The third decisional role, that of resource allocator
determining which work units will get which resources

difficult_points: that of resource allocator 是同位语，解释 third decisional role。
which work units will get which resources 是 determining 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: Top managers are likely to make large, overall budget decisions, while middle managers may make more specific allocations.
sentences.translation: 高层经理可能作出大型的总体预算决策，而中层经理可能作出更具体的分配。

structure.text: are likely to make large, overall budget decisions
while middle managers may make more specific allocations

difficult_points: while 连接高层和中层经理的预算决策对比。
be likely to 表示可能性，more specific 与 large, overall 对照。

sentences.sentence: Finally, the negotiator works with others, such as suppliers, distributors, or labor unions, to reach agreements regarding products and services.
sentences.translation: 最后，谈判者与供应商、分销商或工会等他人合作，就产品和服务达成协议。

structure.text: such as suppliers, distributors, or labor unions
to reach agreements regarding products and services

difficult_points: such as 列举 negotiator 合作对象。
to reach agreements 是合作的目的不定式。

sentences.sentence: Although Mintzberg's initial research in 1960s helped categorise manager approaches, Mintzberg was still concerned about research involving other roles in the workplace.
sentences.translation: 尽管明茨伯格在20世纪60年代的最初研究帮助对经理的做法进行分类，但他仍然关注职场中的其他角色研究。

structure.text: Although Mintzberg's initial research in 1960s helped categorise manager approaches
about research involving other roles in the workplace

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，主句主语是 Mintzberg。
involving other roles 是现在分词短语修饰 research。

sentences.sentence: Minstzberg considered expanding his research to other roles, such as the role of disseminator, figurehead, liaison and spokesperson.
sentences.translation: 明茨伯格考虑把研究扩展到其他角色，例如传播者、名义首脑、联络人和发言人。

structure.text: to other roles, such as the role of disseminator, figurehead, liaison and spokesperson

difficult_points: consider 后接动名词 expanding。
such as 后列举四种其他角色。

sentences.sentence: Each role would have different special characteristics, and a new categorisation system would have to be made for each role to understand it properly.
sentences.translation: 每个角色都会有不同的特殊特征，因此必须为每个角色建立新的分类体系，才能正确理解它。

structure.text: and a new categorisation system would have to be made for each role to understand it properly

difficult_points: would have 与 would have to be made 表示假设下的结果。
to understand it properly 是建立分类体系的目的。

sentences.sentence: While Mintzberg's initial research was helpful in starting the conversation, there has since been criticism of his methods from other researchers.
sentences.translation: 尽管明茨伯格最初的研究有助于开启这场讨论，但此后其他研究人员一直在批评他的方法。

structure.text: While Mintzberg's initial research was helpful in starting the conversation
has since been criticism of his methods from other researchers

difficult_points: While 引导让步背景从句。
there has been 是现在完成时存在句型，criticism 是真正主语。

sentences.sentence: Some criticisms of the work were that even though there were multiple categories, the role of manager is still more complex.
sentences.translation: 对这项工作的部分批评是：即使存在多个类别，经理这一角色仍然更加复杂。

structure.text: that even though there were multiple categories, the role of manager is still more complex

difficult_points: even though 引导嵌套让步从句。
that 从句作 were 的表语，说明批评内容。

sentences.sentence: There are still many manager roles that are not as traditional and are not captured in Mintzberg's original three categories.
sentences.translation: 仍有许多经理角色并不传统，也没有被明茨伯格最初的三个类别涵盖。

structure.text: that are not as traditional and are not captured in Mintzberg's original three categories

difficult_points: there are 存在句型的真正主语是 many manager roles。
两个 are not... 并列，第二个为被动语态。

sentences.sentence: In addition, sometimes, Mintzberg's research was not always effective.
sentences.translation: 此外，明茨伯格的研究有时并不总是有效。
difficult_points: In addition 是递进连接语，sometimes 表示频率。
was not always effective 使用过去时评价研究效果。

sentences.sentence: The research, when applied to real-life situations, did not always improve the management process in real-life practice.
sentences.translation: 这项研究应用于现实情境时，并不总能改善现实实践中的管理流程。

structure.text: did not always improve the management process in real-life practice

difficult_points: when applied... 是省略主语的过去分词短语，逻辑主语是 research。
did not always improve 表示效果并非始终存在。

sentences.sentence: These two criticisms against Mintzberg's research method raised some questions about whether or not the research was useful to how we understand "managers" in today's world.
sentences.translation: 针对明茨伯格研究方法的这两项批评引发了一些问题：这项研究对于我们理解当今世界的“经理”是否有用。

structure.text: These two criticisms against Mintzberg's research method
some questions about whether or not the research was useful to how we understand "managers" in today's world

difficult_points: whether or not 引导介词 about 的宾语从句。
how we understand managers 是 useful to 的理解对象。

sentences.sentence: However, even if the criticisms against Mintzberg's work are true, it does not mean that the original research from the 1960s is completely useless.
sentences.translation: 然而，即使针对明茨伯格工作的批评属实，也不意味着20世纪60年代的原始研究完全没有用。

structure.text: even if the criticisms against Mintzberg's work are true
that the original research from the 1960s is completely useless

difficult_points: even if 引导让步条件从句。
it 是形式主语，that 从句说明 does not mean 的真正内容。

sentences.sentence: Those researchers did not say Mintzberg's research is invalid.
sentences.translation: 那些研究人员并没有说明茨伯格的研究无效。
difficult_points: did not say 后接省略 that 的宾语从句。
invalid 是 research 的表语。

sentences.sentence: His research has two positive functions to the further research.
sentences.translation: 他的研究对后续研究有两项积极作用。

structure.text: two positive functions to the further research

difficult_points: has two positive functions 表示研究产生两项作用。
to the further research 指作用所面向的后续研究。

sentences.sentence: The first positive function is Mintzberg provided a useful functional approach to analyse management.
sentences.translation: 第一项积极作用是，明茨伯格提供了一种有用的管理分析职能方法。

structure.text: Mintzberg provided a useful functional approach to analyse management

difficult_points: The first positive function is 后接表语从句。
provided a useful functional approach 是从句内部主干。

sentences.sentence: And he used this approach to provide a clear concept of the role of manager to the researcher.
sentences.translation: 他还运用这种方法，为研究人员提供了关于经理角色的清晰概念。

structure.text: to provide a clear concept of the role of manager to the researcher

difficult_points: And 承接上句，句首保留原文大写。
to provide... 表示使用方法的目的。

sentences.sentence: When researching human behavior, it is important to be concise about the subject of the research.
sentences.translation: 研究人类行为时，明确研究对象非常重要。

structure.text: to be concise about the subject of the research

difficult_points: When researching 是省略主语的时间状语，逻辑主语是人们。
it 是形式主语，真正主语是不定式 to be concise。

sentences.sentence: Mintzberg's research has helped other researchers clearly define what a "manager" is, because in real-life situations, the "manager" is not always the same position title.
sentences.translation: 明茨伯格的研究帮助其他研究人员清楚界定“经理”是什么，因为在现实情境中，“经理”并不总是同一个职位名称。

structure.text: because in real-life situations, the "manager" is not always the same position title

difficult_points: what a manager is 是 define 的宾语从句。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释研究为何有帮助。

sentences.sentence: Mintzberg's definitions added clarity and precision to future research on the topic.
sentences.translation: 明茨伯格的定义为今后关于这一主题的研究增添了清晰性和准确性。

structure.text: to future research on the topic

difficult_points: added clarity and precision 是 add A and B 的并列宾语。
to future research 表示增添清晰性和准确性的对象。

sentences.sentence: The second positive function is Mintzberg's research could be regarded as a good beginning to give a new insight to further research on this field in the future.
sentences.translation: 第二项积极作用是，明茨伯格的研究可以被视为一个良好开端，为该领域未来的进一步研究带来新的洞见。

structure.text: Mintzberg's research could be regarded as a good beginning to give a new insight to further research on this field in the future

difficult_points: could be regarded as 是被动表达，表示“可被视为”。
to give a new insight 是 good beginning 的目的或作用。

sentences.sentence: Scientific research is always a gradual process.
sentences.translation: 科学研究始终是一个渐进的过程。
difficult_points: always 修饰 is，强调科学研究的渐进性。
a gradual process 是系动词后的表语。

sentences.sentence: Just because Mintzberg's initial research had certain flaws, does not mean it is useless to other researchers.
sentences.translation: 不能因为明茨伯格最初的研究存在某些缺陷，就认为它对其他研究人员毫无用处。

structure.text: Just because Mintzberg's initial research had certain flaws
it is useless to other researchers

difficult_points: Just because... does not mean... 是“不能因为……就认为……”结构。
it is useless to... 是 mean 后的宾语从句，it 指研究。

sentences.sentence: Researchers who are interested in studying the workplace in a systematic way have older research to look back on.
sentences.translation: 那些有兴趣以系统方式研究职场的研究人员，可以回顾早期的研究。

structure.text: Researchers who are interested in studying the workplace in a systematic way
older research to look back on
who are interested in studying the workplace in a systematic way

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 Researchers。
to look back on 是 older research 的后置不定式修饰。

sentences.sentence: A researcher doesn't have to start from the very beginning— older research like Mintzberg's has shown what methods work well and what methods are not as appropriate for workplace dynamics.
sentences.translation: 研究人员不必从最初起步——像明茨伯格研究这样的旧研究已经显示出哪些方法有效，以及哪些方法不太适合职场动态。

structure.text: doesn't have to start from the very beginning
older research like Mintzberg's has shown what methods work well and what methods are not as appropriate for workplace dynamics

difficult_points: doesn’t have to 表示没有必要。
what methods work well 与 what methods are not... 是 shown 的两个宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: As more young professionals enter the job market, this research will continue to study and change the way we think about the modern workplace.
sentences.translation: 随着越来越多的年轻职场人士进入就业市场，这项研究将继续探索并改变我们思考现代职场的方式。

structure.text: As more young professionals enter the job market
will continue to study and change
the way we think about the modern workplace

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示随着年轻人进入就业市场。
the way we think about... 是 change 的宾语，说明改变的内容。
